issues.problem: No DDL available in SSDT to verify the wiki's 21 element count against the actual table definition. Column inventory is unverifiable.
No explicit Phase Gate Checklist section with [x]/[ ] markers. Footer says 'Phases: 11/14' but does not identify which phases were completed or skipped.
Description notes ApiPrice × ApiQuantity = 1.0 when both are -1 but does not flag this as a data quality artifact that should be filtered in analysis.
The ApiPrice fallback when Price = -1 is buried in a parenthetical in the element description. This critical branching condition deserves more prominent treatment.

issues.column_or_section: Instrument_Name, Name, Side, FeeCurrency, PartyName, OrderId, TradeId
issues.problem: char(50)/char(70) fixed-width padding not mentioned in individual element descriptions. Only the Gotchas section warns about RTRIM(). Analysts reading Elements in isolation would not know to trim.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Wiki passes. Optional polish: (1) Add explicit Phase Gate Checklist section with [x]/[ ] markers for each phase. (2) Add RTRIM() note to char-type column descriptions. (3) Flag ApiFunds=1.0 as a sentinel artifact in the element description. (4) If possible, verify 21-column count against HOLD table metadata.

skipped_phases: Phase Gate Checklist section missing — cannot determine which of the 3 skipped phases were P2/P3
